---
title: "Techniques Catalog"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: false
---

Demonstrations of technique by real makers. Videos jump to the exact moment shown. The companion source bibliography covers the underlying tools and theory.

## Unconfirmed seeds (not citable)

These are real makers/pages, but the specific technique moment is not yet verified. Watch, then promote to confirmed.

- **Gabriel Schama** — Layered laser-cut plywood relief assembly ([web              # youtube | maker-tok | instagram | wikihow | makerspace | web](https://www.gabrielschama.com/))
- **Martin Tomsky** — Deep multi-layer laser-cut illustrative scenes ([web](https://www.martintomsky.com/))
